parameters.apprise_url_plus: bulksms://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own BulkSMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise bulksms:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a BulkSMS v1/messages JSON body and post it to api.bulksms.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"to":"${ customer_secrets.BULKSMS_SMS_TO }","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "") .. ((_body.title and _body.title ~= "" and _body.body and _body.body ~= "") and ": " or "") .. (_body.body or "")) *},"routingGroup":"STANDARD","encoding":"TEXT"}
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment BulkSMS destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to BulkSMS v1/messages (no Apprise)

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkSMS password

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkSMS targets

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's BulkSMS user
